description: Create a support case in SuiteCRM for NVIDIA Corporation regarding a data pipeline latency spike after the v4.1 upgrade. Use the following details: Subject: 'Data pipeline latency spike after v4.1 upgrade', Account Name: 'NVIDIA Corporation', Priority: 'High', Status: 'New', Type: 'Product'. Description: 'Following the v4.1 platform upgrade deployed on February 8, the GPU telemetry data pipeline is experiencing 3-5x latency increase during peak hours (9am-5pm PST). Average ingestion time went from 200ms to 800-1200ms per batch. This is impacting real-time monitoring dashboards for the DGX A100 cluster fleet. Reverting to v4.0 is not an option

metadata.expected_subject: Data pipeline latency spike after v4.1 upgrade
